language.#text: Taj Dubai, located in Dubai's Business Bay, offers breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and its fountain.  This hotel is a short distance from the Dubai Opera and Dubai Mall.  The 296 luxurious rooms and suites feature contemporary Indian design with handcrafted furniture and artwork.  Dining options include Tesoro (international cuisine), Miss Tess (Asian street food), Bombay Brasserie (award-winning Indian fare), Byzantium Lounge (afternoon tea), Eloquent Elephant gastropub, and Treehouse rooftop lounge.  Amenities include a spa, health club, outdoor pool, nightclub, complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, babysitting (surcharge), and a complimentary shuttle.  The hotel offers 24-hour room service, a coffee shop/cafe, and a poolside bar. Buffet breakfast is available daily (fee applies).  Business facilities include a business center, express check-in/out, and 465 square meters of event space. Free self-parking and valet parking are available.  The hotel is a short drive from Dubai International Airport (DXB), with a 24-hour airport shuttle available (surcharge).  Rooms feature minibars, LED TVs, down comforters, premium bedding, and bathrooms with separate bathtubs and showers.  Nearby attractions include Dubai Opera (0.9 km), Dubai Fountain (1.3 km), Burj Khalifa (1.3 km), Dubai Mall (1.6 km), and Dubai International Airport (15.7 km).  Business Bay and Burj Khalifa Metro stations are within 1 km.  Mall of the Emirates is a 10-minute drive, and Dubai Marina is a 20-minute drive away.
The Taj Dubai is a  hotel.

language.#text: Taj Dubai, located in Dubai's Business Bay, offers breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and its fountain.  This hotel is a short distance from the Dubai Opera and Dubai Mall.  The 296 luxurious rooms and suites feature contemporary Indian design with handcrafted furniture and artwork.  Dining options include Tesoro (international cuisine), Miss Tess (Asian street food), Bombay Brasserie (award-winning Indian fare), Byzantium Lounge (afternoon tea), Eloquent Elephant gastropub, and Treehouse rooftop lounge.  Amenities include a spa, health club, outdoor pool, nightclub, complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, babysitting (surcharge), and a complimentary shuttle.  The hotel offers 24-hour room service, a coffee shop/cafe, and a poolside bar. Buffet breakfast is available daily (fee applies).  Business facilities include a business center, express check-in/out, and 465 square meters of event space. Free self-parking and valet parking are available.  The hotel is a short drive from Dubai International Airport (DXB), with a 24-hour airport shuttle available (surcharge).  Rooms feature minibars, LED TVs, down comforters, premium bedding, and bathrooms with separate bathtubs and showers.  Nearby attractions include Dubai Opera (0.9 km), Dubai Fountain (1.3 km), Burj Khalifa (1.3 km), Dubai Mall (1.6 km), and Dubai International Airport (15.7 km).  Business Bay and Burj Khalifa Metro stations are within 1 km.  Mall of the Emirates is a 10-minute drive, and Dubai Marina is a 20-minute drive away.
The Taj Dubai is a  hotel.
